meta.title: Georgian Playback Theatre — An extraordinary place where your story is brought to life on stage
meta.description: Georgian Playback Theatre Center — the first Playback Theatre in Tbilisi. You tell a story, and actors bring it to life on stage. Free admission. Last Saturday of the current month, 20:00, Khorava 14.
meta.keywords: playback theatre, Georgian Playback Theatre, Tbilisi, improvisational theatre, spontaneous theatre, theatre in Tbilisi, extraordinary place, free performance, playback in Georgia
meta.author: Georgian Playback Theatre Center
meta.ogTitle: Georgian Playback Theatre — Your story brought to life on stage
meta.ogDescription: An extraordinary place in Tbilisi where your story comes to life on stage. Last Saturday of the current month, 20:00.
meta.twitterDescription: You tell a story — we bring it to life on stage.

what.title: What is Playback Theatre
what.hook: You tell a story — actors bring it to life on stage.
what.quote: This is a meeting place where people see and understand each other, where you can come as you truly are, share your individual, unique story which will be listened to with such attention that they will try to find a resonance within themselves, and based on that shared feeling, transform it into a stage performance.

steps.title: We listen
steps.description: During the performance, we invite audience members to share real stories from their life

steps.title: We play
steps.description: We bring these stories to life on the spot through acting and live music

steps.title: We playback
steps.description: We play the story back to the teller — transforming it into a shared experience

opening.doubt: I initially thought, that it would be difficult to implement such theatre in Georgia...
opening.resolve: But people show us trust, share their personal stories, and by doing so bring the theatrical process to life.
opening.author: Tsisia Cholokashvili

inline: Watching someone else's story, I saw myself. It was a very powerful experience.
I couldn't believe I could feel so safe among strangers.
It was my first time and I couldn't imagine something like this was possible. I wanted to both cry and laugh.
carousel: Watching someone else's story, I saw myself. It was a very powerful experience.
I couldn't believe I could feel so safe among strangers.
It was my first time and I couldn't imagine something like this was possible. I wanted to both cry and laugh.
Watching my own story on stage, I felt such lightness, as if a weight had been lifted.
I was filled with emotions all week after that evening.
This is not just theatre. This is something profoundly human.
Now I realize this is exactly the place I needed so much, and from today I'll be at every performance.

founder.title: About the Center

timeline.text: Playback Theatre founded (Jonathan Fox & Jo Salas)
Georgian Playback Theatre Center founded in Tbilisi

founder.subhook: Today the center operates in three directions:

activities.title: Performances
activities.description: Monthly improvisational performances based on audience stories — open and free

activities.title: Education
activities.description: Basic and practitioner courses, for becoming a Playback Theatre actor

activities.title: Organizations
activities.description: Exclusive performances, workshops and training programs for organizations

team.title: Team
team.size: Today the center is home to 14 people from diverse professional backgrounds, united by Playback Theatre.
team.founderRole: Founder · Playback Practitoner · Ballerina · Practicing Psychotherapist
team.founderDesc: For me personally, as the founder and director of the Georgian Playback Theatre, this space represents the convergence of my two professional experiences: professional theatre and psychotherapy practice.

performance.title: Experience Playback
performance.cardSubtitle: Every performance is exclusive and never repeats
performance.noteText: What happens here can't be measured in money — but any contribution helps us keep this going. We look forward to seeing you 💓

organizations.title: For Organizations
organizations.intro: Offer your team an extraordinary experience. Playback Theatre strengthens trust, empathy, and communication — what conventional trainings cannot achieve.

services.title: Exclusive Performance
services.description: A private performance for your organization: your team's stories on stage

services.title: Workshop
services.description: A practical seminar on listening, spontaneity, and teamwork skills

services.title: Training Program
services.description: A customized program tailored to your organization's needs

courses.title: Courses
courses.intro: We don't just perform — we teach. We're always looking for new people who want to become Playback Theatre actors.

ethics.title: Code of Ethics
ethics.intro: Playback Theatre follows the ethical principles of CPT (Center for Playback Theatre):

items.title: Respect
items.text: We respect each person, their experience and their story. We honor the wholeness of each individual and act so as never to diminish them.

items.title: Inclusivity
items.text: We are open to any story. We strive to amplify voices that are often unheard in society.

items.title: Spontaneity
items.text: We allow events to unfold naturally, without pre-planning or manipulation.

items.title: Competence
items.text: Our team continuously develops competence through learning, practice, and supervision.

items.title: Social Responsibility
items.text: We understand Playback Theatre's potential to promote social justice. We use art as an instrument of change.

items.title: Integrity
items.text: We act with honesty and transparency. Our words and actions are consistent.

support.title: Support
support.text: Playback Theatre needs support beyond performances — we continuously invest in raising our skills, invite trainers from leading European Playback theatres, and develop this space. Your donation makes all of this possible.

closing.title: So what is Playback Theatre, really?
closing.quote: For me, Playback Theatre is a transition from big, structured and predetermined theatre to a small, authentic space built on human encounter, spontaneity and genuineness, where a person can be who they truly are.
closing.final: It is in this human, living relationship that I see the main value of Playback Theatre.
